input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IN.10.5 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: in.10.5
            TITLE: maximum permitted sound level

            CONTENT:
            rule IN.10.5: Maximum Permitted Sound Level
IN.10.5 Maximum Permitted Sound Level  
a. At idle   103 dBC, fast weighting 
b. At all other speeds   110 dBC, fast weighting

final_answer: rule IN.10.5: Maximum Permitted Sound Level IN.10.5 Maximum Permitted Sound Level a. At idle 103 dBC, fast weighting b. At all other speeds 110 dBC, fast weighting
